title: Lemek #3929
definition:
Lamech = "powerful"

 1) the 5th lineal descendant from Cain, husband of Adah and Zillah,
    father of sons, Jabal, Jubal, and Tubal-cain, and daughter, Naamah
 2) father of Noah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Lamech = "powerful"

 1) the 5th lineal descendant from Cain, husband of Adah and Zillah,
    father of sons, Jabal, Jubal, and Tubal-cain, and daughter, Naamah
 2) father of Noah

    NASB:  a desc. of Cain, also a desc. of Seth
